history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02, column B, facing right. The cell directly in front of me is row 02, column C, which contains lava (L). I cannot move forward safely. Turning left would face me toward row 01, B, which is a wall (#). Therefore, I should turn right to face down, where the next cell (row 03, B) is a safe floor (.). This will allow me to eventually navigate toward the goal at row 04, column D.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02, column B, facing down. The cell directly in front of me (row 03, column B) is a safe floor (`.`). Moving there brings me closer to the goal at row 04, column D, allowing me to then go down again and right. So the best action is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03, column B, facing down (`v`). Below me is cell B04, which is a safe floor (`.`). Moving forward is safe and brings me closer to the goal. If I turn left now to face right, moving forward would land on lava at C03, so I should move down first, then turn left to head toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04, column B, facing down. The goal is at row 04, column D. To reach it, I need to face right. Turning left from down will make me face right.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell row 04 column B, facing right. The cell directly ahead is row 04 column C, which is a floor (`.`). Moving forward will put me one step closer to the goal at row 04 column D. No obstacles or lava in the immediate path.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column C, facing right (`>`). The goal is directly in front of me at row 04 column D. Moving forward will take me to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
